hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('tool_name',''); i=d.get('tool_input',{}); pattern=re.compile(r'^\.env(?!\.example|\.sample|\.template)'); blocked=(t in ('Read','Write','Edit') and pattern.match(i.get('file_path','').replace('\\\\','/').split('/')[-1])) or (t=='Bash' and re.search(r'(?:^|[\s/])(\.env)(?!\.example|\.sample|\.template)',i.get('command',''))); sys.stderr.write('Acces au .env interdit dans ce projet\n') or sys.exit(2) if blocked else sys.exit(0)"
